message:
Fix print button and enhance HTML export renderer

Bug fix:
- template.rs: Remove inline onclick="window.print()" from print button
  that was bypassing the printConversation() function which expands
  collapsed sections before printing

Enhancements:
- renderer.rs: Add agent-specific CSS classes and display names
- renderer.rs: Add tool status rendering with icons
- renderer.rs: Add message indexing for deep linking
- renderer.rs: Add author display support
- renderer.rs: Add long message collapse functionality
- renderer.rs: Add tool-specific icons (Bash, Read, Write, etc.)
- renderer.rs: Add JSON pretty-printing for tool inputs/outputs
- filename.rs: Add topic support for robot mode exports
- filename.rs: Add normalize_topic() function
- mod.rs: Update re-exports for new public API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
